_comment: Source of truth for the app-shell UI resource set. Edit here, then regenerate the .resx with tools/i18n/gen-resx.ps1. English ('en') is the base (Ui.resx); every other culture is a satellite (Ui.<culture>.resx). Adding a language = add a culture block with all keys + add it to Core.Constants.SupportedCultures. Machine-first translations; flagged for human review.

en.app.reconnect.restoring: Restoring your live connection to the server.
en.app.reconnect.retrying: We couldn't reach the server. Retrying…
